title: clinanthus humilis
intro: Clinanthus humilis, also known as the desert marigold, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Clinanthus humilis can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
